title: WP17 first controlled setting-write evidence plan example

records.title: Placeholder lighting evidence requiring future capture
records.environment: Sanitized example; no hardware trace included.
records.userActionContext: Future evidence must identify a specific official-app visual setting action.
records.timingSequence: Unknown; must document previous, candidate, follow-up, and acknowledgement traffic.
records.reversibilityNotes: Rollback must be demonstrated before any future review.
records.backupPossibility: Unknown; pre-write backup requirements are not satisfied.
records.readBackPossibility: Unknown; no approved read-back command exists for this setting.
records.physicalVerificationMethod: Possible visual verification only; future evidence required.
records.gplSourceCleanlinessStatement: No GPL-3.0 source code, comments, constants, packet builders, structures, or implementation material copied.
records.redactionSanitizationStatus: Sanitized placeholder, no serials, private paths, or raw private traces.
records.reviewerNotes: Example evidence is incomplete and must not be executed.

candidates.title: Possible future visual-only lighting setting
candidates.targetInterfaceMetadata: Must be documented before future review.
candidates.officialAppUserActionContext: Future evidence must document exact action and avoid save/apply/sync ambiguity.
candidates.riskScoreExplanation: Evidence is incomplete; risk is treated as unacceptable for first write.
candidates.physicalVerificationPlan: Visual verification may be possible but is not documented.
candidates.unknownsAndUncertainties: Exact bytes, report ID, length, response, rollback, backup, and verification are unknown.
candidates.gplSourceCleanlinessStatement: No GPL-3.0 source code, comments, constants, packet builders, structures, or implementation material copied.
candidates.futureImplementationRequirements: Separate WP18-or-later implementation and Red Team plan.
candidates.futureRedTeamReviewRequirements: Complete evidence, rollback, backup, verification, and source-cleanliness review.

safetyNotes: No setting write is implemented, approved, enabled, or executed.
Candidate readiness and evidence completeness do not enable execution.
Backup, rollback, read-back, and physical verification evidence remain planning data only.
The future write gate remains disabled and requires a separate work package and Red Team plan.
